title.en: China-to-South Korea BESS Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入韩国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入韓國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against South Korea KC battery safety, post-ESS-fire safety reforms, KEPCO grid-connection, and UN 38.3 transport expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与韩国 KC 电池安全、ESS 火灾后安全改革、KEPCO 并网及 UN 38.3 运输要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與韓國 KC 電池安全、ESS 火災後安全改革、KEPCO 併網及 UN 38.3 運輸要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, KC scope determination, fire-safety approval, KEPCO grid-connection approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current South Korea KC, KFI, fire-code, grid, transport, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、KC适用范围裁定、消防安全批准、KEPCO并网批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行韩国KC、KFI、消防规范、电网、运输及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、KC適用範圍裁定、消防安全批准、KEPCO併網批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行韓國KC、KFI、消防規範、電網、運輸及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to South Korea, KC battery safety certification is compulsory where the product or battery component is in scope, including KC 62619 for industrial lithium batteries and KC 62133 for portable sealed secondary cells/batteries. The main additional gaps are post-ESS-fire fire-safety reforms involving KBIA/KFI expectations, KEPCO grid-connection review, and UN 38.3 transport testing.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口韩国时，产品或电池部件落入适用范围的，KC电池安全认证属于强制要求，包括工业用锂电池KC 62619和便携式密封二次电芯/电池KC 62133。主要额外差距包括ESS火灾后KBIA/KFI相关消防安全要求、KEPCO并网审查，以及UN 38.3运输测试。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口韓國時，產品或電池部件落入適用範圍的，KC電池安全認證屬於強制要求，包括工業用鋰電池KC 62619和便攜式密封二次電芯／電池KC 62133。主要額外差距包括ESS火災後KBIA/KFI相關消防安全要求、KEPCO併網審查，以及UN 38.3運輸測試。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, fire authority, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
